name: arborist/get_semantic_skeleton
title: Get Semantic Skeleton
description: Read semantic source information without writing project files. Legacy JSON-RPC method: arborist/get_semantic_skeleton.

file_path.description: Source file path. Python (.py, .pyi), C (.c, .h), and C++ extensions are supported; C++ uses the Tree-sitter C++ grammar.

source.description: Optional unsaved source buffer to analyze instead of reading from disk.

expand_nodes.description: Semantic selectors to expand in the returned skeleton.

result.description: Semantic skeleton and available semantic selectors for a source file.

available_paths.description: Semantic selectors available for expansion or patching.

items.description: Symbol metadata available from a semantic skeleton.

byte_range.description: Inclusive start and exclusive end byte offsets.
